note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right cervical wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Abscess abscess Right cervical measures 0.8 cm x 0.7 cm x 0.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 62% slough, 38% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Abscess abscess Right cervical — not improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Debridement consult ordered.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Abscess to Right cervical / Measures 0.8 cm x 0.7 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Pack with iodoform gauze daily.
